description: Purple textured handbag crafted from synthetic leather Two short handles woven through metallic loops Metallic brand badge, an external insert pocket and one external zipped pocket with zippers on the sides on the front One slot with magnetic press-buttoned closure, one main zipped compartment with an inner zipped pocket and a mobile pouch on the sides, and one zippered compartment behind it One external zipped pocket at the back Purple textured handbag crafted from synthetic leatherTwo short handles woven through metallic loopsMetallic brand badge, an external insert pocket and one external zipped pocket with zippers on the sides on the frontOne slot with magnetic press-buttoned closure, one main zipped compartment with an inner zipped pocket and a mobile pouch on the sides, and one zippered compartment behind itOne external zipped pocket at the back
